name: Provenance Agent Unit Evaluation
description: Golden dataset for the provenance specialist. Tests ownership history and legal checks in isolation.

parts.text: Check provenance for a Monet Water Lilies acquired via Christie's London 1989, Lot 42. Country of origin: France.
Provenance is well documented via major auction house. No export restrictions identified for France to UK transfer in 1989. Ownership chain is clean.
Check provenance for an oil painting, European origin, unknown ownership from 1939 to 1946. Current owner acquired in 1980 from a private dealer.
A gap in ownership from 1939 to 1946 raises significant provenance concerns due to potential wartime displacement. Further research is strongly recommended before any sale.
Check provenance for a 2015 contemporary painting purchased directly from the artist, documented invoice, no prior sales history.
Provenance is straightforward for a contemporary work purchased directly from the artist. No export restrictions apply. Clean title.
